scenes.narration: Moses stood before the most powerful king in the world — Pharaoh of Egypt. He had one message: Let my people go.
scenes.image_prompt: Moses standing boldly before the giant throne of Pharaoh in an enormous Egyptian palace, staff in hand, confident expression, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Pharaoh said no. Again and again, he said no. Until he couldn't say no anymore.
scenes.image_prompt: Angry Pharaoh on his throne crossing his arms, Moses standing calmly before him, Egyptian palace with towering pillars, bright colorful storybook art

scenes.narration: Finally, Pharaoh let the people go. Hundreds of thousands of people walked out of Egypt — free.
scenes.image_prompt: Enormous crowd of joyful people walking out of Egypt into the desert, Moses leading them with his staff raised, bright sunny day, colorful cheerful bible illustration

scenes.narration: But Pharaoh changed his mind. He sent his whole army after them — chariots, horses, soldiers.
scenes.image_prompt: Massive Egyptian army with chariots and horses charging across the desert, dust cloud rising, dramatic colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: The people were trapped. The Red Sea in front of them. The army behind them. There was nowhere to go.
scenes.image_prompt: Huge crowd of Israelites standing at the edge of the vast Red Sea looking terrified, Egyptian army visible in the distance behind them, dramatic colorful bible art

scenes.narration: Moses raised his staff over the water. And God sent a mighty wind.
scenes.image_prompt: Moses standing at the edge of the sea, staff raised high, enormous wind blowing his robes, the sea beginning to split apart, dramatic colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: The sea split in two. A wall of water on each side. And a dry path right through the middle.
scenes.image_prompt: The Red Sea split wide open with towering walls of blue water on each side, a dry sandy path stretching through the middle, golden light ahead, epic colorful bible storybook art

scenes.narration: They walked through. Every man, woman, and child — safe on the other side.
scenes.image_prompt: Crowds of happy people walking through the parted Red Sea, walls of water towering beside them, children looking up in wonder, bright joyful colorful storybook illustration

scenes.narration: When the army followed... the waters came crashing back down.
scenes.image_prompt: The walls of the Red Sea crashing back together with a massive splash, the Israelites watching safely from the far shore, dramatic and powerful colorful bible illustration

scenes.narration: God made a way where there was no way. He still does that today.
scenes.image_prompt: Moses and the Israelites celebrating on the far shore, arms raised in joy, sun shining brightly, calm sea, God's golden light shining down, joyful colorful storybook art
